phase_name: ad-hoc: Ketcher settings modal unclip + canvas-meta formula fix

completed_tasks.name: Remove overflow:hidden from module .ketcher and .canvasWrap — allows settings modal to escape clip
Restore overflow:hidden on global .ketcher (styles.css) — clips Ketcher toolbar overflow (H/CNOS/PFClBrI)
Add plain canvas-wrap class alongside module class on canvasWrap div — activates canvas-meta CSS positioning
Fix formula bug in App.tsx: layers[0].text → layers.find(l => l.type === formula).text
Add border-radius to .canvasWrap and .mol-list to restore visual rounding
Added 20 drug molecules to preset picker (aspirin, morphine, atorvastatin, etc.)

remaining_tasks.name: Browser-verify: Ketcher settings modal no longer clipped at top/bottom
Browser-verify: H/CNOS/PFClBrI no longer visible outside editor
Browser-verify: canvas-meta shows correct formula (e.g. C10H14N2 for nicotine, not 1S)
Browser-verify prior /q and /p highlight fixes (thiamine q+1, CuSO4 q+2, CuSO4 p-2)
Commit the 4 modified files once browser verification passes

human_actions_pending.context: All changes are CSS/JS — cannot verify from static analysis. Run npm run dev and test manually.

decisions.decision: Remove overflow:hidden from module .canvasWrap and module .ketcher, but restore on global .ketcher
decisions.rationale: Ketcher modal overlay uses position:absolute anchored to .canvasWrap (position:relative). Module overflow:hidden clipped the dialog at 460px. Global .ketcher overflow:hidden only clips Ketcher's own internal toolbar elements since the modal escapes to .canvasWrap level.

decisions.decision: Add plain canvas-wrap class to canvasWrap div alongside module class
decisions.rationale: CSS selector .canvas-wrap .canvas-meta in styles.css never matched the module-scoped element. canvas-meta was rendering in normal flow below the editor, hidden by overflow:hidden. Dual class activates position:absolute and dotted background gradient.

decisions.decision: Fix formula: layers.find(l => l.type === formula)?.text instead of layers[0].text
decisions.rationale: layers[0] is the version layer (text: 1S), not formula. Pre-existing bug masked by overflow:hidden.

next_action: Run npm run dev, browser-verify all 4 cases, then: git add src/App.tsx src/components/KetcherPanel.module.css src/components/KetcherPanel.tsx src/styles.css && git commit
context_notes: Session started with /gsd-resume-work. Prior /q /p highlight fixes were pushed (abe3f91 and earlier). Added 20 drug molecules. Then fixed Ketcher settings modal clipping — overflow:hidden chain at module level cut the settings dialog. Also uncovered and fixed a pre-existing canvas-meta formula bug (was showing 1S instead of molecular formula). 174/174 tests pass. All 4 modified files are unstaged.
